channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Friday, May 1, 2026
item.description: Today's candidate pool is genuinely thin — a quiet Friday on the feeds — but a few signals are worth your attention. The Fox/Tubi upfront story is a concrete data point about where ad budgets are moving in 2026, directly relevant as you position consulting services around AI-driv...
